hero.title: Community culture that protects people and builds trust
hero.subhead: Our culture rewards patience, clear communication, and practical help over hype.

paragraphs: FamBIT is strongest when members feel safe to ask, learn, and correct mistakes without shame. Respectful guidance keeps new people engaged and lowers avoidable risk.
Culture is not a slogan; it is daily behavior. We protect quality by reinforcing healthy habits and refusing manipulation language.

whatThisMeans.title: What this means
items: Use clear language and avoid pressure tactics.
Share educational context, not emotional pushes.
Correct misinformation in public and respectfully.
Prioritize safety reminders during active discussions.

rituals.title: Community rituals
items: Beginner question window with patient replies.
Monthly reflection on what improved community quality.

moderation.title: Moderation stance
moderation.body: Moderation favors clarity, fairness, and safety. Manipulation language, impersonation, and repeated pressure behavior are removed quickly.

contribute.title: How to contribute
items: Welcome newcomers and point them to verification guidance.
Share practical learning resources in plain language.
Report suspicious behavior early with clear evidence.

trust.microcopy: Healthy culture is a daily safety practice.
